title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: NHPC is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
